repair_order_required_fields: Vehicle delivery date or date of first use
Labor operation codes, quantities, and hours
Sublet amount and sublet codes if applicable
Sublet final invoice number and vendor name if applicable
Towing amount, invoice number, and vendor name if applicable
Freight amount, carrier, and shipping date if applicable
Original installation date/original mileage/original RO or counter ticket for replacement service parts if applicable
repair_order_supporting_requirements: Technician identified by name or number next to each labor operation
All replaced parts listed on the repair order
Separate or automated parts invoice must cross-reference the repair order and be attached to the technician copy
digital_attachments_required: Sublet photo or video if applicable
audit_support_documents: Parts scrapping copy of repair order
Dealer accounting file copy of repair order
DCS acknowledgment / Claim Status Report copy
Payroll support records including time tickets and flag sheets
Outside purchase/service invoices and proof of payment
Purchase orders / AP files / parts inventory files / open account statements as applicable
Customer sales files including RDR and sales contract
Customer service files including PDI checklist, delivery presentation, and copies of repair orders
GDS before/after readings or screenshots when applicable
Any other records supporting claim form data

add_on_warranty_repairs: Technician written description of needed work
Service Manager signature next to added repair
Customer authorization details if approved by phone
Customer signature next to added repair
Cross-reference if warranty repair came off customer-pay RO
powertrain_10yr_100k_validation: Photocopy of current unexpired DMV registration
basica00_fcs_upload_fail: GDS screenshot saved in RO documentation retention and attached to the claim

minimum_submission_checklist: Signed repair order with complaint, cause, and correction
Customer signatures at write-up and delivery
Causal part and replacement part numbers
Required digital photos or videos: VIN, Miles, Part, and Sublet if applicable
Required invoices, rental documents, towing documents, sublet documents, or GDS screenshots for that claim type
Claim Status / DCS support retained in file
